case_title: INTERCONNECT OF THE TWIN CITIES vs. B & B SAN FRANCISCO LLC DBA BISCUITS & BLUES

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF INTERCONNECT OF THE TWIN CITIES, A MINNESOTA GENERAL PARTNERSHIP, DBA ADS ON PARAGON AS TO DEFENDANT B & B SAN FRANCISCO LLC DBA BISCUITS & BLUES
